__schema0.description: A string that uniquely identifies a calendar. You can get information for multiple calendars by using a comma-separated list of ids or a wildcard expression. You can get information for all calendars by using `_all` or `*` or by omitting the calendar identifier.

__schema2.description: Specifies to get events with timestamps earlier than this time.

__schema6.description: Skips the specified number of events.

__schema8.description: Specifies to get events for a specific anomaly detection job identifier or job group. It must be used with a calendar identifier of `_all` or `*`.

__schema10.description: Specifies the maximum number of events to obtain.

__schema12.description: Specifies to get events with timestamps after this time.
